summary: Start M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001 after M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001 closed on origin/main. This task productizes map presentation using existing read models without changing map authority.

tests_run.result: Clean main at 9a3b0c40cb5e7086fa9e5560f2bde89c62c3c131 before branch creation.
M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001, M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001, and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 were READY candidates; selected map presentation as the highest-priority UI quality task.

decisions.decision: Start M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001 before player guidance and save/cloud boundaries because the accepted UI/localization plan orders map presentation before downstream guidance/regression exit work.

Writer may modify apps/web, packages/client-core, packages/ui, packages/map-renderer, tests, .storybook, and process paths only; sim/protocol/save/platform/content/docs gate/roadmap/release scope remains forbidden.
No Human Gate is active. Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

risks.summary: Map polish can accidentally make Pixi authoritative or duplicate pathfinding/control state.
risks.mitigation: Require render-cache-only behavior, read-model rebuildability, and systems_architect review.

risks.summary: New map symbols could imply unsupported historical/cultural claims.
risks.mitigation: Use neutral placeholders and existing design-token/asset slots; no production culture-specific art.

requested_action: Spawn client_engineer writer and implement M7 map presentation quality within task constraints, then return REVIEW handoff.
